BIO

My Name is Samuel Bush. I've had about a years worth of working experience as a full stack Developer intern, and six months as a Desktop/Floor technitian I have been studying computer science since 2014 in addition to criminal justice in college.

May 2018 - Mar 2019 Software QA Tester, evaluate projects based on required acceptance criteria, or test cases and implementation.
